description: Clean up stale documentation in docs/ directory. Fix outdated CLI command references, remove deprecated schema fields, consolidate duplicated content, and update all package references from @coderef/core to local/dashboard paths. Address all issues identified in AUDIT-REPORT.md.
goal: Refresh all documentation to reflect current codebase state, eliminate stale content, and ensure accurate CLI/API references
requirements: Fix CLI command references: npx coderef scan → npx coderef-scan
Update README.md with all 8 CLI commands
Remove @coderef/core package references (use local build instead)
Consolidate 3 MIGRATION*.md files into single MIGRATION.md
Merge ROUTE-VALIDATION.md and ROUTE-DETECTION.md into ROUTE.md
Update API.md with missing exports (IncrementalCache, ScannerRegistry)
Verify all code examples compile and work
Remove completed workorder references from user-facing docs
constraints: No references to @coderef/core npm package (not yet published)
Use local build paths: npm run build:cli && node dist/src/cli/index.js
Keep ARCHITECTURE.md as source of truth for diagrams
Preserve all valid technical content during consolidation

functional: All CLI commands use correct syntax (coderef-scan, not 'coderef scan')
README.md lists all 8 CLI commands with examples
Consolidated docs maintain all original content
quality: All code examples tested and working
